name: Trade Desk, Inc.
business: Trade Desk is a global leader in advertising technology, empowering ad buyers to create, manage and optimize digital advertising campaigns. The company generates revenue by charging clients a platform fee generally based on a percentage of total platform spend. Its clients are advertising agencies, advertisers and other service providers.
sellsTo: service providers for agencies or advertisers

exposures.sentence: Our platform s depth, artificial intelligence ( AI ) capabilities and rich ecosystem of inventory, publisher and data partner integrations enable superior reach and decisioning for clients.
We plan to continue investing significant resources in technology, sales and support staff related to our CTV growth initiatives.

We continue to develop and enhance Unified ID 2.0, an open-source identity framework that operates by transforming email addresses or phone numbers into an advertising identifier (a UID2) that is designed to not directly identify the individual.
We provide rich third-party datasets in our data marketplace to improve campaign performance.

catalysts.event: Board authorized additional $350 million for share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, an additional $350 million was authorized under the Company s share repurchase program, bringing the total amount available for future repurchases to $500 million.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market for global advertising surpassed $1 trillion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: The total addressable market ( TAM ) for global advertising is reported to have surpassed $1 trillion for the first time in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Digital advertising spend estimated at over $700 billion annually, representing more than 70% of total market spend.
tamClaims.sentence: Digital advertising is reported to represent the largest and fastest-growing segment of the global advertising industry, with estimated annual spend of over $700 billion and representing more than 70% of the total market spend.
